log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Deep Gnome — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Deep Gnome — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Deep Gnome — Unarmored Caster HP: 49/67
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 15] HIT! 22 damage. Deep Gnome — Unarmored Caster HP: 27/67
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 15] HIT! 22 damage. Deep Gnome — Unarmored Caster HP: 5/67
--- Deep Gnome — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 5/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (5/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Deep Gnome — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 2 ══
